---
description: "Generate an Architecture Decision Record (ADR) documenting a technical decision with Contoso standards compliance and industry best practices references."
agent: "adr-writer"
argument-hint: "Describe the architecture decision: what problem needs to be solved, what options are being considered, and any constraints."
---
Generate a complete Architecture Decision Record (ADR) for the described decision.

Reference Contoso company standards from the `standards/` folder and research alternatives using the msdocs-mcp-server for Microsoft Learn documentation.

The ADR must include:
- Context and decision drivers
- At least 2-3 considered options with pros/cons
- Decision with rationale
- Each option evaluated against Contoso standards compliance
- Industry best practices references with MS Learn URLs
- Consequences (positive, negative, neutral)
- Contoso Standards Compliance table
